response.justification: Bogdan Szabo lacks the core mandatory C++ experience on the Windows platform required for this role (his C++ work appears minimal and older, primarily in a non-financial domain). While he has substantial software development experience and domain exposure in capital markets (RIDE Capital), his technical stack is heavily skewed toward web/mobile technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than the C++/SQL Server/Oracle stack specified for this role. His fixed-income or derivatives expertise is not evidenced.
strengths: Demonstrated full-stack development skills with a focus on testable, high-quality code
Experience in capital markets environments (RIDE Capital) showing domain exposure
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in diverse tech stacks
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience on Windows platform (only early-career C++/C work noted)
Lacks SQL Server/Oracle depth and fixed-income domain expertise as required
Recent work heavily favors web/mobile technologies over C++/financial systems
